channel.title: Agentic-Ai on DevOpsTales
channel.description: Recent content in Agentic-Ai on DevOpsTales

item.title: Kilo Code: Understanding Modes and the Orchestrator
item.description: In our previous post, we unlocked massive power by integrating Qwen Code CLI. But with great power comes the need for great management.

item.title: Kilo Code: The Future of Agentic Software Development
item.description: The world of AI coding is moving fast. We’ve seen the rise of simple autocomplete, then the transition to chat-based assistants, and now we are entering the era of Agentic AI.
